seoTitle: Ridgewood vs Rifle Range — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ridgewood and Rifle Range. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ridgewood vs Rifle Range: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ridgewood and Rifle Range.
heading: Ridgewood vs Rifle Range — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ridgewood, Queensland and Rifle Range, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ridgewood has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Rifle Range (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ridgewood or Rifle Range safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ridgewood has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Rifle Range scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ridgewood scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Rifle Range scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ridgewood or Rifle Range?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ridgewood has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
